title: Proceedings Combined 31st International Workshop on Expressiveness in Concurrency and 21st Workshop on Structural Operational Semantics
summary: This volume contains the proceedings of EXPRESS/SOS 2024: the Combined 31st International Workshop on Expressiveness in Concurrency and the 21st Workshop on Structural Operational Semantics, which was held in Calgary, Canada, as an affiliated workshop of CONFEST 2024. The EXPRESS/SOS workshop series aims at bringing together researchers interested in the formal semantics of systems and programming concepts, and in the expressiveness of computational models.
